inputs.label: Driver Pulley Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the driving pulley, typically between 50 and 500 mm. Influences belt speed and tension.

inputs.label: Driven Pulley Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the driven pulley, which determines the speed reduction or increase ratio relative to the driver.

inputs.label: Center Distance
inputs.businessContext: Distance between the centers of the two pulleys. Affects belt length and wrap angle.

inputs.label: Driver RPM
inputs.businessContext: Rotational speed of the driving pulley in revolutions per minute. Standard motor speeds are 1500 or 1800 RPM.
